name: Venison Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the bacon drippings in a heavy Dutch oven.
2. Add the cubed venison and cook until it is slightly browned.
3. Add the chopped onions, minced garlic, and bell peppers. Cook until they become limp.
4. Stir in the canned tomatoes, tomato paste, chili powder, cumin, paprika, salt, cinnamon, cocoa, and black pepper.
5. Pour in water to achieve the desired consistency.
6. Simmer for 45 minutes to 1 hour, stirring occasionally.
7. If using hot chili beans, add them at this point and continue cooking for another 45 minutes to 1 hour.
